item.description: Mourners are filling the streets of Tehran as part of a days-long memorial for Iran’s former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the first strikes of the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for Sunday TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Millions Pour Into Tehran to Mourn Late Supreme Leader
media:content.media:description: Mourners are filling the streets of Tehran as part of a days-long memorial for Iran’s former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the first strikes of the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for Sunday TODAY.

item.title: Millions Pour Into Tehran to Mourn Late Supreme Leader

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Greg Rosenstein
Monica Alba
item.description: United States striker Folarin Balogun has been reinstated for the team’s round-of-16 match against Belgium on Monday after earning a red card in the previous round, FIFA announced Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Folarin Balogun #20 of the United States celebrates scoring his team's first goal.
media:content.media:description: Folarin Balogun #20 of the United States celebrates scoring his team's first goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 match between USA and Bosnia and Herzegovina at San Francisco Bay Area Stadium on July 01, 2026 in Santa Clara, Calif.

item.title: U.S. star Folarin Balogun eligible to play vs. Belgium after FIFA suspends red card ban

item.description: Los noruegos continúan invictos ante Brasil y vive un gran momento el cuadro nórdico. Haaland, Odegaard y compañía van por la Canarinha y avanzar a cuartos de final.

media:content.media:title: ¡Se enciende el Androide! Haaland calienta motores para el duelo ante Brasil
media:content.media:description: Los noruegos continúan invictos ante Brasil y vive un gran momento el cuadro nórdico. Haaland, Odegaard y compañía van por la Canarinha y avanzar a cuartos de final.

item.title: ¡Se enciende el Androide! Haaland calienta motores para el duelo ante Brasil

item.description: La Selección de Brasil está alistándose para el gran enfrentamiento ante Noruega. Vinícius Junior y compañía buscan el sexto campeonato mundial y reafirmar su autoridad en el fútbol.

media:content.media:title: Vinícius Junior y compañía se preparan para afrontar el reto vikingo en New York
media:content.media:description: La Selección de Brasil está alistándose para el gran enfrentamiento ante Noruega. Vinícius Junior y compañía buscan el sexto campeonato mundial y reafirmar su autoridad en el fútbol.

item.title: Vinícius Junior y compañía se preparan para afrontar el reto vikingo en New York

item.description: Julio César, Roberto Carlos y Cafú analizan por qué el tradicional "jogo bonito" fue desapareciendo del fútbol brasileño. Las leyendas coinciden en que el juego moderno es más táctico, físico y práctico que el de otras épocas.

media:content.media:title: ¿Qué pasó con el "jogo bonito" de Brasil? | Hoy en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Julio César, Roberto Carlos y Cafú analizan por qué el tradicional "jogo bonito" fue desapareciendo del fútbol brasileño. Las leyendas coinciden en que el juego moderno es más táctico, físico y práctico que el de otras épocas.

item.title: ¿Qué pasó con el "jogo bonito" de Brasil? | Hoy en el Mundial

item.description: En un mano a mano presentado por Volkswagen, Bruno Guimarães reveló la historia detrás del número 39, un homenaje al taxi de su padre y al apoyo que recibió desde niño para cumplir su sueño de llegar al fútbol profesional.

media:content.media:title: El emotivo significado detrás del número 39 de Bruno Guimarães | Vive El Mundial
media:content.media:description: En un mano a mano presentado por Volkswagen, Bruno Guimarães reveló la historia detrás del número 39, un homenaje al taxi de su padre y al apoyo que recibió desde niño para cumplir su sueño de llegar al fútbol profesional.

item.title: El emotivo significado detrás del número 39 de Bruno Guimarães | Vive El Mundial

item.description: Brasil ya llegó al MetLife Stadium para enfrentar a Noruega en los octavos de final de la Copa Mundial. Dunga destacó a Vinícius Jr. como un jugador “decisivo” en los grandes partidos, mientras la Canarinha busca romper su historial ante los noruegos.

media:content.media:title: Dunga no duda entre Vinícius y Haaland: “Vini es decisivo” | Vive El Mundial
media:content.media:description: Brasil ya llegó al MetLife Stadium para enfrentar a Noruega en los octavos de final de la Copa Mundial. Dunga destacó a Vinícius Jr. como un jugador “decisivo” en los grandes partidos, mientras la Canarinha busca romper su historial ante los noruegos.

item.title: Dunga no duda entre Vinícius y Haaland: “Vini es decisivo” | Vive El Mundial

item.description: El Míster recompensó el gol de Martinelli ante Japón dándole la titular ante Noruega e hizo ajustes en el equipo acordes para las características del rival, que le ayuden a conseguir el paso a los cuartos de final.

media:content.media:title: Ancelotti explica los cambios en Brasil para ir por la victoria ante Noruega
media:content.media:description: El Míster recompensó el gol de Martinelli ante Japón dándole la titular ante Noruega e hizo ajustes en el equipo acordes para las características del rival, que le ayuden a conseguir el paso a los cuartos de final.

item.title: Ancelotti explica los cambios en Brasil para ir por la victoria ante Noruega

item.description: Julian Ryerson regresa al once titular de Noruega para enfrentar un juego decisivo ante Brasil, sabiendo que deben ofrecer todas sus habilidades para frenar el ataque de los sudamericanos, especialmente a Vinícius Jr.

media:content.media:title: Ryerson es titular: "A la gente en casa, haremos todo lo posible por la victoria"
media:content.media:description: Julian Ryerson regresa al once titular de Noruega para enfrentar un juego decisivo ante Brasil, sabiendo que deben ofrecer todas sus habilidades para frenar el ataque de los sudamericanos, especialmente a Vinícius Jr.

item.title: Ryerson es titular: "A la gente en casa, haremos todo lo posible por la victoria"

item.description: La Canarinha nunca ha podido vencer a Noruega y hoy quieren terminar con la racha negativa que cargan. El cuadro de Ancelotti busca parar la maquinaría ofensiva de Noruega y avanzar a cuartos de final.

media:content.media:title: Brasil está llegando a East Rutherford con el objetivo de frenar a Haaland y compañía
media:content.media:description: La Canarinha nunca ha podido vencer a Noruega y hoy quieren terminar con la racha negativa que cargan. El cuadro de Ancelotti busca parar la maquinaría ofensiva de Noruega y avanzar a cuartos de final.

item.title: Brasil está llegando a East Rutherford con el objetivo de frenar a Haaland y compañía

item.description: La Selección de Noruega llega inspirada a “La Gran Manzana” para firmar su mejor Copa Mundial, pero Brasil busca defender su historia y el orgullo para mantenerse con vida en la competición.

media:content.media:title: Los vikingos navegan hasta New York y se enfrentan a una poderosa Selección de Brasil
media:content.media:description: La Selección de Noruega llega inspirada a “La Gran Manzana” para firmar su mejor Copa Mundial, pero Brasil busca defender su historia y el orgullo para mantenerse con vida en la competición.

item.title: Los vikingos navegan hasta New York y se enfrentan a una poderosa Selección de Brasil

item.description: El capitán de la selección de Brasil se refirió a la importancia del juego contra Noruega, afirmando que están preparados e hicieron los ajustes para frenar el ataque de los noruegos, jugadores que ya muchos han enfrentado en Europa.

media:content.media:title: Marquinhos: "Hicimos los ajustes para neutralizar a Noruega"
media:content.media:description: El capitán de la selección de Brasil se refirió a la importancia del juego contra Noruega, afirmando que están preparados e hicieron los ajustes para frenar el ataque de los noruegos, jugadores que ya muchos han enfrentado en Europa.

item.title: Marquinhos: "Hicimos los ajustes para neutralizar a Noruega"

item.description: NBC News is learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding at New York City’s Madison Square Garden from two guests who were there. The bride and groom both wore white and the entertainment was provided by Stevie Nicks and Paul McCartney. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports in this week’s Sunday Focus.

media:content.media:title: What We Know About Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding
media:content.media:description: NBC News is learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding at New York City’s Madison Square Garden from two guests who were there. The bride and groom both wore white and the entertainment was provided by Stevie Nicks and Paul McCartney. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports in this week’s Sunday Focus.

item.title: What We Know About Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding

item.description: President Trump concluded the semiquincentennial celebration by reflecting on the nation's history, honoring veterans and pushing his political agenda during his address at the Salute to America event. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports on key points from the president's speech.

media:content.media:title: Trump uses America’s 250 speech to honor military heroes and also push political agendas
media:content.media:description: President Trump concluded the semiquincentennial celebration by reflecting on the nation's history, honoring veterans and pushing his political agenda during his address at the Salute to America event. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports on key points from the president's speech.

item.title: Trump uses America’s 250 speech to honor military heroes and also push political agendas

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Christine Rapp
item.description: A weeklong heat wave that officials believe has killed at least 25 people continued Sunday, with 40 million people under heat alerts across the East Coast, Southeast and Southwest.

media:content.media:text: A Tribute To America On The National Mall In D.C. Celebrates America's 250th
media:content.media:description: A young visitor shields themself from the sun in during July 4th celebrations in Washington, D.C. on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A Tribute To America On The National Mall In D.C. Celebrates America's 250th
media:content.media:description: Visitors grab bottles of cold water at the Great American State Fair on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Dust blowing into the air through a crowd of people on the National Mall.
media:content.media:description: Visitors shield themselves from dust blown into the air by high winds from a passing storm during July Fourth celebrations on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., on Saturday.

item.title: 25 dead in ongoing heat wave as storms bring flood and wind threats to the East Coast

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Jay Blackman
item.description: A Delta flight was struck by a firework while descending into Chicago on July Fourth, according to the airline.

media:content.media:text: Delta Air Lines At Los Angeles International Airport
media:content.media:description: A Delta Air Lines Boeing 767 taxis at Los Angeles International Airport after arriving from New York on September 1, 2024 in Los Angeles, California.

item.title: Firework strikes Delta flight landing at Chicago’s Midway Airport

item.description: President Trump highlighted the potential approval of the SAVE America Act during his Salute to America 250 speech, stating his goal to require photo identification to vote and limit the use of mail-in ballots.

media:content.media:title: Trump touts SAVE America Act during Salute to America 250 speech
media:content.media:description: President Trump highlighted the potential approval of the SAVE America Act during his Salute to America 250 speech, stating his goal to require photo identification to vote and limit the use of mail-in ballots.

item.title: Trump touts SAVE America Act during Salute to America 250 speech

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: The best 4th of July sales are happening now. Our editors found worthwhile deals on Apple, Yeti, Medicube and more.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

item.title: The best Fourth of July sales to shop right now

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow has suspended her campaign for the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate

media:content.media:text: Michigan State Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.
media:content.media:description: Democratic state Sen. Mallory McMorrow suspended her campaign for U.S. Senate ahead of the Aug. 4 primary.

item.title: Mallory McMorrow ends bid for Democratic Senate nomination in Michigan

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Jay Blackman
item.description: A Delta flight was struck by a firework while descending into Chicago on July Fourth, according to the airline.

media:content.media:text: Delta Air Lines At Los Angeles International Airport
media:content.media:description: A Delta Air Lines Boeing 767 taxis at Los Angeles International Airport after arriving from New York on September 1, 2024 in Los Angeles, California.

item.title: Firework strikes Delta flight landing at Chicago’s Midway Airport

item.dc:creator: Kimmy Yam, TODAY
Samantha Cookinham
item.description: For days, details surrounding the wedding between Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce remained hidden behind a veil of mystery.

media:content.media:description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce.

item.title: Guests reveal details from inside Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s star-studded wedding

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Greg Rosenstein
Monica Alba
item.description: United States striker Folarin Balogun has been reinstated for the team’s round-of-16 match against Belgium on Monday after earning a red card in the previous round, FIFA announced Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Folarin Balogun #20 of the United States celebrates scoring his team's first goal.
media:content.media:description: Folarin Balogun #20 of the United States celebrates scoring his team's first goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 match between USA and Bosnia and Herzegovina at San Francisco Bay Area Stadium on July 01, 2026 in Santa Clara, Calif.

item.title: U.S. star Folarin Balogun eligible to play vs. Belgium after FIFA suspends red card ban

item.description: A weeklong heat wave that officials believe has killed at least 25 people continued Sunday, with 40 million people under heat alerts across the East Coast, Southeast and Southwest.

media:content.media:text: A Tribute To America On The National Mall In D.C. Celebrates America's 250th
media:content.media:description: A young visitor shields themself from the sun in during July 4th celebrations in Washington, D.C. on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A Tribute To America On The National Mall In D.C. Celebrates America's 250th
media:content.media:description: Visitors grab bottles of cold water at the Great American State Fair on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Dust blowing into the air through a crowd of people on the National Mall.
media:content.media:description: Visitors shield themselves from dust blown into the air by high winds from a passing storm during July Fourth celebrations on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., on Saturday.

item.title: 25 dead in ongoing heat wave as storms bring flood and wind threats to the East Coast

item.dc:creator: Elmira Aliieva
item.description: An underground church pastor has been released from prison in China and has arrived in the United States, less than two months after President Donald Trump publicly raised his case with Chinese President Xi Jinping.

media:content.media:description: Pastor Ezra Jin Mingri speaks during an interview at the Zion Church in Beijing in 2018.

item.title: Chinese pastor released from prison after Trump raised his case with Xi Jinping
